violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sanitizer is emitting but not reading. Bad jug of sanitizer.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Dishwasher needs cleaned on outside.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean top of dishwasher, -Clean all shelving racks in kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean walls by dishwasher and fry station. -Clean floor edges in kitchen.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
